subject: Re: Fw: Olivia Decker
body:
please tell her that we would like to make a formal
offer...  to do that we will need a full and complete
legal description parcels , outbuildings, can she give
us more details on the mortgage, as french wealth tax,
becomes an issue, name of bank.etc.  value of personal
things,, furniture vehicles, equiptment. list of
liens, .. the name of her french attorney

--- Gmax <gmax1@mindspring.com> wrote:

> 
> G
> 
> 
> -----Original Message-----
> From: jpm6929@aol.com
> Date: Mon, 29 May 2006 10:56:49 
> To:gmax1@mindspring.com
> Subject: Olivia Decker
> 
> Ghislene dearest, 
> I spoke yesterday with Olivia regarding Villette,
> and I have a very strong feeling she is in quite a
> mood to negociate the sell. She told me about a
> house in Como and she forgot that she hadï¿½asked me
> if I knew of some property in Como, and she went on
> and on. I visited Villette yesterday , to see the
> master bedroom that we all missed last time, and I
> met with the former caretaker (an irishman), and was
> quite interesting. By the way, Sotheby's appraisal
> for the furniture is in the order of 5 to 600 000
> euros. Creo que esta esperando algo por escrito para
> empezar.... 
> Besos 
> J.P.

please tell her that we would like to make a formal
offer... to do that we will need a full and complete
legal description parcels , outbuildings, can she give

--- Gmax gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

G

-----Original Message-----
From: jpm6929@aol.com
Date: Mon, 29 May 2006 10:56:49
To:gmax1@mindspring.com
Subject: Olivia Decker

Ghislene dearest,
I spoke yesterday with Olivia regarding Villette,
and I have a very strong feeling she is in quite a
mood to negociate the sell. She told me about a
house in Como and she forgot that she hadï¿½asked me
if I knew of some property in Como, and she went on
and on. I visited Villette yesterday , to see the
master bedroom that we all missed last time, and I
met with the former caretaker (an irishman), and was
quite interesting. By the way, Sotheby's appraisal
for the furniture is in the order of 5 to 600 000
euros. Creo que esta esperando algo por escrito para
empezar....
Besos
J.P.
